examples: Lines 94-119 (beforeEach): Complex db.select().from().where() with conditional logic can be replaced with DatabaseMockBuilder
Lines 372-381, 390-404, 417-423, 435-450, 457-466: All use Object.defineProperty(service, 'db', { value: { select: vi.fn().mockReturnValue(...) } }). Extract to helper function
Lines 39-52: mockArticles, mockCategories, mockTags created manually. Use MockUtils.testData.createArticle(), createCategory(), createTag()
Lines 54-131: Manual service mocks can use MockUtils.services.createHookServiceMock() and createConfigServiceMock()
Lines 480-500, 511-537: Complex selectCallCount logic repeated. Simplify with DatabaseMockBuilder setQueryResult()
sitemap.controller.spec.ts lines 21-23: mockConfigService manual creation. Use MockUtils.services.createConfigServiceMock()

detailedAnalysis.description: Sitemap module has significant MockUtils optimization potential with 8 nearly-identical database mock patterns and repeated Object.defineProperty usage

opportunities: Replace 8 db mock chain creations across multiple test methods with DatabaseMockBuilder pattern
Extract 9 Object.defineProperty calls to setDbMockOnService() helper function
Replace manual hookService/settingCoreService/configService mocks with MockUtils factories
Use MockUtils.testData factories instead of manual test data objects

locations.pattern: Complex db.select().from().where() with conditional logic based on table type

locations.location: test 'should use id when pathname is null' lines 390-404
locations.pattern: db.select().from().where() for articles with null pathname

locations.location: test 'should return encoded category URLs' lines 417-423
test 'should return encoded tag URLs' lines 435-450
test 'should generate correct number of pages' lines 457-466
test 'should fallback to list length' lines 511-537

mockRepositoryPattern.recommendation: Use DatabaseMockBuilder.setQueryResult() or extract setDbMockOnService() helper to avoid repetition

testingModulePattern.recommendation: Extract to createSitemapTestingModule() factory function for reusability

items.current: Manual ConfigService mock with get method
Manual array creation with hardcoded IDs

locations: Test 'use id when pathname null': lines 390-393 (duplicate)
And reused 3+ more times throughout tests

rationale: Service test has 8 nearly-identical db mock patterns (150 lines) - prime candidate for refactoring
9 occurrences of Object.defineProperty pattern for setting db on service - clear extraction opportunity
Test data objects repeated 6+ times across different test methods
MockUtils already exists with DatabaseMockBuilder and service factories
Estimated 260 lines can be removed (28% of total test file size)
Changes are low-risk and improve long-term maintainability
nextSteps: Step 1: Create SitemapTestHelper function with setDbMockOnService(service, data) pattern
Step 2: Create SitemapTestData factory with predefined mock articles/categories/tags
Step 3: Migrate service mock setup (lines 55-68) to use MockUtils.services factories
Step 4: Extract Testing Module setup (lines 70-88) to createSitemapTestingModule() factory
Step 5: Replace all 8 db mock patterns with either DatabaseMockBuilder or setDbMockOnService()
Step 6: Update controller test to use MockUtils.services.createConfigServiceMock()
mockUtilsExtensions: Consider adding setServiceMock() helper to MockUtils for generic Object.defineProperty pattern
